matrix.symptom: Valid transformation outputs are silently not staged for patch generation
matrix.root_cause: Executor assumes wrapped transform envelope with data key; transformer returns raw transformed payload in direct-call path
matrix.required_runner_capability: Validate result envelope schema before staging; reject or normalize mismatched outputs
matrix.evidence_required: Staged output manifest, result-envelope validation report
matrix.verification_test: Given valid transform output without data wrapper, executor stages patch input exactly once

matrix.symptom: Missing fields remain unset after default injection phase
matrix.root_cause: Column metadata lacks actionable default definitions; all defaults resolve to None
matrix.required_runner_capability: Verify required fields/default-fill expectations after phase execution; enforce declared default semantics from schema
matrix.evidence_required: Before/after field population report, default-source manifest
matrix.verification_test: When defaults are declared for eligible columns, post-phase record contains those values

matrix.symptom: Invalid or incomplete outputs can reach promotion path
matrix.root_cause: Validator checks structure but not full policy-level invariants; no enforcement of required columns from schema
matrix.required_runner_capability: Require mandatory post-execution gate pass before promotion; validate all REQUIRED columns from schema are non-null
matrix.evidence_required: Validation report against schema/invariant catalog, required-columns check log
matrix.verification_test: Outputs missing required governed fields fail gate and do not promote

matrix.symptom: Timestamp clustering uses wrong field name causing empty clusters
matrix.root_cause: Code reads f.get(created_at) but registry field is allocated_at or created_utc; non-authoritative timestamp source
matrix.required_runner_capability: Validate input schema contract before execution; enforce authoritative field names from column dictionary
matrix.evidence_required: Field name validation report, cluster population statistics
matrix.verification_test: Clusterer reads authoritative timestamp field and produces non-empty clusters

matrix.symptom: Pipeline cannot promote records because official 20-digit file_id is missing; SHA256 used as surrogate
matrix.root_cause: Transformer/executor use SHA256 as file_id; registry requires 20-digit numeric ID; no identity resolution layer
matrix.required_runner_capability: Fail closed unless identity contract resolved; block mutation/executor paths until official file_id resolution proven
matrix.evidence_required: Resolved file_id lookup report, identity mapping manifest, promotion status log
matrix.verification_test: Given file with SHA256, identity layer resolves 20-digit file_id before executor allows promotion

matrix.symptom: doc_id collision detection runs but does not update registry; analysis-only mode
matrix.root_cause: Component emits collision analysis report but has no write path to registry; no mutation contract defined
matrix.required_runner_capability: Define mutation-safety contract with write-path ownership; require governed mutation contract before registry writes
matrix.evidence_required: Collision resolution plan, mutation ledger, registry update confirmation
matrix.verification_test: doc_id resolver identifies collisions and writes resolution plan to registry under mutation contract

matrix.symptom: Module deduplication identifies duplicates but does not update registry; analysis-only mode
matrix.root_cause: Component emits deduplication report but has no write path; FILE WATCHER path prefix pollution causes false positives
matrix.required_runner_capability: Define mutation-safety contract; canonicalize paths before comparison; require governed mutation before writes
matrix.evidence_required: Deduplication resolution plan, canonicalized path report, registry update confirmation
matrix.verification_test: Module deduplicator canonicalizes paths, identifies true duplicates, writes resolution under mutation contract

matrix.symptom: No idempotency mechanism exists; validation always re-runs even for identical inputs
matrix.root_cause: No fingerprint contract defined; no skip logic based on inputs + version hash
matrix.required_runner_capability: Compute fingerprint from inputs + spec version; store fingerprints; skip execution if fingerprint exists unless forced
matrix.evidence_required: Fingerprint computation log, fingerprint storage manifest, skip decision log
matrix.verification_test: Given identical inputs and spec version, runner skips execution and returns cached result

matrix.symptom: All automation re-runs unconditionally; no replay avoidance
matrix.root_cause: No shared runner enforces fingerprint-based skip logic; scripts have no idempotency layer
matrix.required_runner_capability: Runner computes fingerprint before execution; checks fingerprint store; skips if match found
matrix.evidence_required: Fingerprint match log, skip statistics, cache hit report
matrix.verification_test: Runner computes fingerprint, finds match, skips execution, emits cached result with provenance

matrix.symptom: 100% of records missing core metadata: doc_id, file_size, canonicality
matrix.root_cause: Metadata fields not populated during initial intake; no backfill automation exists
matrix.required_runner_capability: Require metadata population contract before records considered complete; block promotion if metadata incomplete
matrix.evidence_required: Metadata backfill manifest, before/after record counts, validation report
matrix.verification_test: Given registry records, metadata_backfill.py populates doc_id/file_size/canonicality and validation passes

matrix.root_cause: repo_root_id inference not automated; manual or missing during intake
matrix.required_runner_capability: Require repo_root_id resolution before file record considered complete; infer from path patterns
matrix.evidence_required: repo_root inference manifest, resolution rate report, validation confirmation
matrix.verification_test: Given files with missing repo_root_id, repo_root_inferrer.py infers IDs and validation passes

matrix.symptom: Empty edges[] array; no relationship tracking populated
matrix.root_cause: Relationship generation not automated; edges builder does not exist
matrix.required_runner_capability: Require relationship population before registry considered complete; generate edges from file references
matrix.evidence_required: Edges generation manifest, relationship count report, validation confirmation
matrix.verification_test: Given registry with empty edges[], edges_builder.py generates relationships and validation passes

matrix.symptom: 243/245 entries[] records orphaned (legacy_read_only, no file match)
matrix.root_cause: Orphaned entries not pruned; legacy data retained without cleanup automation
matrix.required_runner_capability: Require entry reconciliation; prune entries without corresponding files; maintain referential integrity
matrix.evidence_required: Entry pruning manifest, before/after orphan counts, referential integrity report
matrix.verification_test: Given orphaned entries[], entries_pruner.py removes unmatched entries and validation passes

matrix.symptom: 6 undocumented columns in registry not present in COLUMN_DICTIONARY
matrix.root_cause: Registry contains columns not defined in authoritative schema; drift between implementation and schema
matrix.required_runner_capability: Enforce schema as authoritative; reject undocumented columns or add to schema under governance
matrix.evidence_required: Column drift report, schema alignment manifest, governance approval log
matrix.verification_test: Given registry columns, validator fails on undocumented columns or schema updated under governance

matrix.symptom: 1 duplicate SHA256 hash detected (ambiguous file_id mapping)
matrix.root_cause: SHA256 collision or duplicate file ingestion without deduplication
matrix.required_runner_capability: Enforce unique SHA256 constraint; detect duplicates at intake; resolve canonical file
matrix.evidence_required: Duplicate detection report, canonical file resolution log, uniqueness validation
matrix.verification_test: Given duplicate SHA256, deduplicator identifies canonical file and updates references

matrix.symptom: Schema version mismatch: registry v4.0 vs schema file v3
matrix.root_cause: Registry evolved beyond schema file; no version synchronization enforcement
matrix.required_runner_capability: Enforce schema version consistency; validate registry against declared schema version
matrix.evidence_required: Version consistency report, schema validation log, upgrade manifest
matrix.verification_test: Registry and schema versions match; validation passes with zero version discrepancies

matrix.symptom: null_coalescer inert because default_injector provides no defaults
matrix.root_cause: Depends on default_injector which is broken; no null-handling logic active
matrix.required_runner_capability: Verify preconditions before phase execution; ensure upstream phase postconditions met
matrix.evidence_required: Null coalescing report, before/after null counts, precondition validation log
matrix.verification_test: Given records with nulls and active defaults, null_coalescer reduces null count to target level

matrix.symptom: Documentation drift: SCRIPT_INDEX.md does not list sha256_backfill.py; outdated descriptions
matrix.root_cause: Documentation manually maintained; no automated sync with actual scripts
matrix.required_runner_capability: Require documentation generation from code/schema; validate docs against implementation
matrix.evidence_required: Documentation coverage report, drift detection log, auto-generation manifest
matrix.verification_test: Given scripts directory, doc generator updates SCRIPT_INDEX.md and validation passes

matrix.symptom: Incomplete phase B/C integration; output shape assumptions brittle
matrix.root_cause: Phase B/C not fully implemented; transformer output shape not formally contracted
matrix.required_runner_capability: Enforce output contract for all phases; validate phase output against contract before handoff
matrix.evidence_required: Phase integration manifest, contract validation log, handoff success report
matrix.verification_test: Given phase A output, phase B consumes under contract and validation passes
